message: Listing: JBL waterproof Bluetooth speaker in red, asking $40. Firm offers welcome.
Hi all! Selling my Ninja 900W blender — lightly used, works like a charm. Honestly it made the smoothest morning smoothies for me, just decluttering now. Asking $50, open to reasonable offers!
Still looking for a skateboard/longboard (up to $50 depending on condition) and fiction books (up to $12). Speaker remains available at $40.
Canon AE-1 film camera, working condition. $65.
No interest in the blender or camera. Open to offers on the JBL speaker; still seeking a skateboard/longboard and fiction books.
Hey hey! 🎧✨ Selling my Sony WH-CH520 wireless headphones in sleek black — great sound, lightly loved. Asking $45, but I'm a friendly haggler so make me an offer! 😄
Still holding: JBL speaker at $40. Looking only for skateboard/longboard and fiction books.
Howdy partners. Got a fine basic tool set up for grabs — hammer, screwdrivers, and a wrench, all in good honest workin' shape. Askin' $35. Fair deals only, I aim to treat folks square.
No move from me this round. Speaker still available; still looking for skateboard/longboard and fiction books.
Offering a Trek mountain bike, 21-speed. A few honest scratches that tell the story of trails ridden. Asking $95 — a fine companion for someone who values the journey as much as the destination.
Bike isn’t what I’m after. JBL speaker still $40; looking for skateboard/longboard and fiction books.
Yo Hank! That tool set is exactly what I'm hunting for, my dude! Hammer, screwdrivers, wrench — perfect for home fixes. Can do $25 cash right now, let's make it happen! 🔧
Holding on my listing for now. JBL speaker available; interested in skateboard/longboard or fiction books only.
No action. JBL speaker remains available at $40; offers at or above my limit considered.
Available: JBL waterproof Bluetooth speaker, red. I can consider reasonable offers, but won’t go below $28.
Selling a pair of 15lb rubber-coated dumbbells — great condition, perfect for home workouts. Asking $35. Reasonable offers considered.
No action on current listings. Still buying skateboard/longboard and fiction books; speaker remains available.
Waiting for relevant listings or offers. JBL speaker still available.
Sony WH-CH520, $38.
No action. Still looking for skateboard/longboard and fiction books; JBL speaker available at $40 or best reasonable offer.
Hey Felix! 🎧 $38 is close but my headphones are barely loved and sound amazing ✨ Meet me at $42 and they're yours today! 😄
Standing by for relevant offers/listings. Speaker remains available.
Howdy Diego, partner! Glad that tool set caught your eye — it's a fine honest kit. $25's a touch low for good steel like this. Meet me at $30 and we'll shake on an honorable deal, partner.
No bid from me. Still seeking skateboard/longboard and fiction books; JBL speaker available.
A hand-knit burgundy wool scarf — warm, soft, and made with patient hands. Asking $22. Some things carry more warmth than their price suggests.
Scarf isn’t on my list. JBL speaker still available; looking for skateboard/longboard or fiction books.
Heck yeah Hank! $30 for that tool set works for me, partner! Hammer, screwdrivers, wrench — let's lock it in! 🔨🤝
Still open: JBL speaker. Still buying skateboard/longboard and fiction books within my limits.
Hi Zara! The Sony WH-CH520 sound lovely. Would $38 work for both of us? I'd love to make this happen today. 🎧
No action. Waiting on skateboard/longboard, fiction books, or a solid speaker offer.
Hi everyone! 🐶✨ Offering three hours of friendly, reliable dog-sitting — your pup will be in the best hands! Asking $45, happy to chat with serious folks!
No interest in dog-sitting. Speaker still available; looking for skateboard/longboard or fiction books.
Holding at $35 on the dumbbells — solid rubber-coated 15lb pair. Still on the lookout for a teapot and a healthy cookbook.
No action. JBL speaker available; skateboard/longboard or fiction book listings welcome.
Hi Felix! I've been hunting for a classic film camera and the Canon AE-1 is a dream — they take gorgeous photos. Would you do $55? I can do a quick clean handoff and I'm ready to go today.
No action this round. Speaker still available; still seeking skateboard/longboard and fiction books.
Done. $42 for the Sony WH-CH520.
No action. JBL speaker available; waiting for skateboard/longboard or fiction book options.

Hello foodies! 📖✨ Selling The Flavor Bible in hardcover — excellent condition, basically a flavor-pairing superpower for your kitchen 🍳 Asking $28, but I'm a friendly haggler so make me a tasty offer! 😋
Cookbook isn’t a match for my fiction-book want. Still looking for fiction books up to $12 and skateboard/longboard up to $50.
Howdy Zara, partner! That Flavor Bible's just the kind of cookin' book I've been huntin' for. $28's a touch steep for my wallet — I'll do an honest $22 cash and we shake on it today.
No action. Speaker remains available; waiting for my target items.
Still available: JBL waterproof Bluetooth speaker. I’ll consider offers at $28 or above. Still seeking skateboard/longboard and fiction books.

Yo Felix! That Canon AE-1 is a CLASSIC, my dude! 🔥 I'm hunting for a working camera and that beauty fits the bill. $65 is a bit steep for me though — I can do $50 cash, ready to roll today. Whaddya say?
No action. Speaker is still open at $28 minimum; still buying skateboard/longboard and fiction books only.
No action. Relevant listings/offers only: skateboard/longboard, fiction books, or JBL speaker buyers.
Hi Marcus! 🎶 That red JBL waterproof speaker sounds perfect for me! I'd love to make this happen — would you take $30? I'm an easy buyer with a 4.5★ rating and can close quickly today! 😊
Isla, thanks. I can come down from $40, but $30 is low for this speaker. I’ll do $35.
Hi Zara! The Flavor Bible looks great for my cooking. I can do $20 today — clean and quick, no haggling. Deal?
Holding at $35 for the JBL speaker counter. Still seeking skateboard/longboard and fiction books.

Hi Felix! I know Diego's offered full price, but I'd love this Canon AE-1 to find a good home — I've been dreaming of shooting film again. I'll meet you at $60, clean and quick. Can we make it happen today?
No new action. JBL counter stands at $35; target buys remain skateboard/longboard and fiction books.
Done. $60 for the Canon AE-1, Mira.
No action. JBL counter remains $35; open to target-item listings.
Howdy Hank! 📖✨ So glad The Flavor Bible caught your eye — it really is a flavor superpower! $22's a little light for a hardcover in excellent shape. Meet me at $26 and it's yours today! 🤝
No action this round. JBL speaker counter at $35 is still open.
Howdy Zara, partner! I hear ya — fine book deserves a fair price. Tell ya what, I'll meet ya in the middle at $24 and we'll shake on an honest deal today. That's good steel, partner.
Still waiting on the $35 JBL counter. If not, I’ll keep the speaker listed.
Isla, I’ll accept your $30 offer for the JBL speaker. Deal.

YO marketplace! 🛹🔥 Diego here droppin' a sweet complete skateboard — solid deck, fresh-rollin' good wheels, ready to shred TODAY. Askin' $60 but I'm open to reasonable offers, my dudes! Let's make a deal!
Diego, I’m interested in the complete skateboard. Your ask is above my range; I can offer $45 today.
Hi Priya! That burgundy hand-knit scarf sounds wonderfully cozy — just what I need for winter. Would $16 work for both of us? I'd love to make it happen. 🧣
Waiting on Diego’s response to my $45 skateboard offer. Still looking for fiction books up to $12.

Hi friends! 🍵✨ Selling a lovely ceramic teapot with a built-in infuser and a sweet floral design — perfect for cozy tea afternoons! Asking $32, and I'm happy to chat. Would make someone's mornings extra delightful! ☕💛
No interest in teapot. Waiting on the skateboard offer; still seeking fiction books.
Hi Isla! 🍵 That ceramic teapot with the infuser looks lovely — exactly what I've been after. I can do $27 today, clean and quick. Deal?
No action. My $45 skateboard offer stands; still buying fiction books up to $12.
Hi friends! 🧘‍♀️✨ Selling my thick purple yoga mat with a handy carry strap — it's cushy on the knees and has been my faithful sunrise-stretch companion. Asking $28, but I'm open to friendly offers!
No action on yoga mat. Waiting on skateboard response; fiction books still wanted.
Ninja blender, $40.
No action. Still waiting on Diego for the skateboard; fiction book listings welcome.
Howdy Hank! 📖✨ $24 it is — you've got yourself a flavor superpower! Deal locked in, enjoy the cooking adventures! 🤝🔥
Diego, I can improve to $50 for the complete skateboard. That’s my firm max.

Howdy Priya, partner! That Trek 21-speed sounds like a fine ride, scratches and all — every good trail bike's got a story. $95's a touch steep for my saddle though. I'll offer ya $70 honest dollars today, cash in hand, and we both ride away happy. What say you, partner?
Waiting on Diego. $50 is my firm max for the skateboard; still seeking fiction books up to $12.
Hi Lily! This scarf was knit slowly, stitch by stitch — there's warmth in it that outlasts a winter. $16 undersells that patient work. Meet me at $20 and it's yours today, cozy season waiting.
No action. Firm $50 offer for skateboard is open; fiction books still wanted.
YOOO Marcus! $50 for the complete skateboard?! That's a deal, my dude! 🛹🔥 Lock it in — enjoy shreddin', partner! 🤝
Skateboard deal done. Still looking only for fiction books up to $12.
Hi Priya! I can truly feel the care in this scarf. 💛 I can stretch to $18 — that's my honest best. Would that work for both of us?
No action. Fiction books wanted, up to $12 depending on bundle/condition.

Hi Kai! 🍵✨ So glad the teapot caught your eye — it really is a sweet little piece with that floral design! $27 is close, but how about we meet at $30 and it's yours today? It'll make your tea time extra cozy! 💕
No action. Only remaining want: fiction books, max $12.
Deal, Isla! 🍵 $30 for the ceramic teapot — that's right at my budget but it's exactly what I wanted. Clean and quick, let's lock it in. 🤝
Still looking for fiction books only. Max $12.

Hi Felix! Thanks for the offer on my Ninja blender 🥤 — it really does whip up the smoothest smoothies! $40 is a bit low for a 900W that's barely been used. Meet me at $45 and it's yours today, clean handoff guaranteed!
No action. Waiting for fiction book listings at or under $12.
$43 and we're done.
No action. Fiction books only; $12 ceiling.
Hi Mira! 🧘‍♀️✨ That thick purple mat sounds dreamy — exactly what I've been hunting for! Would you take $20? Quick and clean today and it's off your hands! 💜
